title: How to teleport to other pits

messages.content: # Wondering how to teleport to the other pits dotted around the map to escape the chaos? Follow this guide!

# Method 1
> Click on the Settings Icon in the top right > press "Teleport Menu" 
> 
> **Warning: Toggle UI must be enabled**

# Method 2
> Download and install [Comfy Map](<https://www.overtake.gg/downloads/comfy-map.52623/>) then **drag & drop** into Content Manager and install it.
> 
> Load into the game > Move your mouse to the right > All apps at the top > Comfy Map
> 
> Now that Comfy Map is open, hover over it and click on one of the dots

# Method 3
> Follow <#1322252040117948556> to setup TP to pit keybind.
